_comment: S&box Linux Native - Pterodactyl egg built from DrakeFruit/sbox-public linux-fixes branch
name: S&box Linux Native
author: vMax@itmightwork.gg
description: Native Linux s&box dedicated server built from source (DrakeFruit/sbox-public linux-fixes). Set RAM to 4096MB+ (do NOT use unlimited).
startup: export DOTNET_ROOT=/home/container/.dotnet && export PATH=$PATH:$DOTNET_ROOT && export TERM=xterm && export COLUMNS=80 && export LINES=24 && export LD_LIBRARY_PATH=/home/container/sbox-public/game/bin/linuxsteamrt64:/home/container/sbox-public/game:$DOTNET_ROOT:$LD_LIBRARY_PATH && cd /home/container/sbox-public/game && stty cols 80 rows 24 2>/dev/null; ./sbox-server +game {{GAME_IDENT}} {{GAME_MAP}} +hostname "{{SRV_NAME}}" +port {{SERVER_PORT}} +queryport {{QUERY_PORT}} {{EXTRA_ARGS}} $([ -n "{{TOKEN}}" ] && echo "+net_game_server_token {{TOKEN}}") 2>&1 | tr '\r' '\n'

installation.script:
#!/bin/bash
# S&box Linux Native Install Script
# Server Files: /mnt/server

set -e

RED='\033[0;31m'
GREEN='\033[0;32m'
YELLOW='\033[1;33m'
BLUE='\033[0;34m'
NC='\033[0m'

echo -e "${BLUE}=================================================${NC}"
echo -e "${YELLOW}  S&box Linux Native - Installation${NC}"
echo -e "${BLUE}=================================================${NC}"

## 1. System dependencies
echo -e "\n${YELLOW}[1/7] Installing system dependencies...${NC}"
apt update
apt install -y \
    git wget curl ca-certificates gnupg apt-transport-https \
    libfontconfig1 libfreetype6 libxi6 libxcursor1 libxrandr2 \
    libxinerama1 libsdl2-2.0-0 libvulkan1 libopenal1
echo -e "${GREEN}[1/7] Dependencies installed.${NC}"

## 2. Install .NET SDK
echo -e "\n${YELLOW}[2/7] Installing .NET SDK...${NC}"
export HOME=/mnt/server
export DOTNET_ROOT=/mnt/server/.dotnet
mkdir -p $DOTNET_ROOT
DOTNET_OK=0

## --- Method 1: Microsoft APT repository ---
echo -e "${YELLOW}[APT] Adding Microsoft package repository...${NC}"
cd /tmp
set +e
wget -q https://packages.microsoft.com/config/debian/12/packages-microsoft-prod.deb -O /tmp/ms-prod.deb
WGET_EXIT=$?
set -e

if [ $WGET_EXIT -eq 0 ] && [ -f /tmp/ms-prod.deb ]; then
    dpkg -i /tmp/ms-prod.deb
    rm -f /tmp/ms-prod.deb
    apt update

    set +e
    echo -e "${YELLOW}[APT] Installing dotnet-sdk-10.0...${NC}"
    apt install -y dotnet-sdk-10.0 2>&1
    APT_EXIT=$?
    set -e

    if [ $APT_EXIT -ne 0 ]; then
        echo -e "${YELLOW}[APT] dotnet-sdk-10.0 not found, trying dotnet-sdk-9.0...${NC}"
        set +e
        apt install -y dotnet-sdk-9.0 2>&1
        APT_EXIT=$?
        set -e
    fi

    if [ $APT_EXIT -eq 0 ] && [ -d "/usr/share/dotnet" ]; then
        echo -e "${YELLOW}[APT] Copying .NET SDK to server directory...${NC}"
        cp -a /usr/share/dotnet/* $DOTNET_ROOT/
        if [ -f "$DOTNET_ROOT/dotnet" ]; then
            DOTNET_OK=1
            echo -e "${GREEN}[APT] .NET SDK installed successfully.${NC}"
        fi
    fi
else
    echo -e "${RED}[APT] Could not download Microsoft repo package.${NC}"
fi

## --- Method 2: Azure CDN direct tarball ---
if [ "$DOTNET_OK" -eq 0 ]; then
    echo -e "${YELLOW}[CDN] Trying Azure CDN direct download...${NC}"
    cd /tmp
    for CHANNEL in "10.0" "9.0"; do
        set +e
        VERSION=$(curl -sSL "https://dotnetcli.azureedge.net/dotnet/Sdk/${CHANNEL}/latest.version" 2>/dev/null | tr -d '\r\n')
        set -e
        if [ -n "$VERSION" ]; then
            URL="https://dotnetcli.azureedge.net/dotnet/Sdk/${VERSION}/dotnet-sdk-${VERSION}-linux-x64.tar.gz"
            echo -e "${YELLOW}[CDN] Downloading .NET $CHANNEL ($VERSION)...${NC}"
            set +e
            wget -q -O /tmp/dotnet-sdk.tar.gz "$URL" 2>&1
            DL_EXIT=$?
            set -e
            if [ $DL_EXIT -eq 0 ] && [ -f /tmp/dotnet-sdk.tar.gz ]; then
                FILE_SIZE=$(stat -c%s /tmp/dotnet-sdk.tar.gz 2>/dev/null || echo 0)
                if [ "$FILE_SIZE" -gt 1000000 ]; then
                    echo -e "${YELLOW}[CDN] Extracting ($FILE_SIZE bytes)...${NC}"
                    tar -xzf /tmp/dotnet-sdk.tar.gz -C $DOTNET_ROOT
                    rm -f /tmp/dotnet-sdk.tar.gz
                    if [ -f "$DOTNET_ROOT/dotnet" ]; then
                        DOTNET_OK=1
                        echo -e "${GREEN}[CDN] .NET $CHANNEL installed.${NC}"
                        break
                    fi
                else
                    echo -e "${RED}[CDN] File too small ($FILE_SIZE bytes), skipping.${NC}"
                    rm -f /tmp/dotnet-sdk.tar.gz
                fi
            fi
        fi
    done
fi

## --- Method 3: dotnet-install.sh ---
if [ "$DOTNET_OK" -eq 0 ]; then
    echo -e "${YELLOW}[Script] Trying dotnet-install.sh...${NC}"
    cd /tmp
    set +e
    curl -sSL -o /tmp/dotnet-install.sh https://dot.net/v1/dotnet-install.sh 2>&1
    set -e
    chmod +x /tmp/dotnet-install.sh
    for CHANNEL in "10.0" "9.0"; do
        echo -e "${YELLOW}[Script] Trying --channel $CHANNEL...${NC}"
        set +e
        /tmp/dotnet-install.sh --channel $CHANNEL --install-dir $DOTNET_ROOT 2>&1
        set -e
        if [ -f "$DOTNET_ROOT/dotnet" ]; then
            DOTNET_OK=1
            echo -e "${GREEN}[Script] .NET SDK installed.${NC}"
            break
        fi
    done
fi

## --- Verify ---
if [ "$DOTNET_OK" -eq 0 ] || [ ! -f "$DOTNET_ROOT/dotnet" ]; then
    echo -e "${RED}=================================================${NC}"
    echo -e "${RED}  FATAL: .NET SDK installation failed.${NC}"
    echo -e "${RED}  All 3 methods failed (APT, Azure CDN, Script).${NC}"
    echo -e "${RED}  Check server network and try reinstalling.${NC}"
    echo -e "${RED}=================================================${NC}"
    exit 1
fi

export PATH=$PATH:$DOTNET_ROOT
echo -e "${GREEN}.NET SDK: $($DOTNET_ROOT/dotnet --version)${NC}"

## 3. Backup data
echo -e "\n${YELLOW}[3/7] Backing up data...${NC}"
if [ -d "/mnt/server/sbox-public/game/data" ]; then
    cp -r /mnt/server/sbox-public/game/data /tmp/sbox-data-backup
    echo -e "${GREEN}[3/7] Data backed up.${NC}"
else
    echo -e "${YELLOW}[3/7] No data folder found, skipping.${NC}"
fi

## 4. Clone or update repo
echo -e "\n${YELLOW}[4/7] Setting up s&box source...${NC}"
if [ -d "/mnt/server/sbox-public/.git" ]; then
    echo -e "${YELLOW}Repo exists, pulling latest...${NC}"
    git config --global --add safe.directory /mnt/server/sbox-public
    cd /mnt/server/sbox-public
    git pull
elif [ -d "/mnt/server/sbox-public" ]; then
    echo -e "${YELLOW}Directory exists but no .git, removing and re-cloning...${NC}"
    rm -rf /mnt/server/sbox-public
    cd /mnt/server
    git clone https://github.com/DrakeFruit/sbox-public.git -b linux-fixes
else
    echo -e "${YELLOW}Cloning DrakeFruit/sbox-public (linux-fixes)...${NC}"
    mkdir -p /mnt/server
    cd /mnt/server
    git clone https://github.com/DrakeFruit/sbox-public.git -b linux-fixes
fi
cd /mnt/server/sbox-public
echo -e "${GREEN}[4/7] Source ready.${NC}"

## 5. Build server
echo -e "\n${YELLOW}[5/7] Building server (this may take 2-10 min)...${NC}"
set +e
$DOTNET_ROOT/dotnet run --project ./engine/Tools/SboxBuild/SboxBuild.csproj -- build --config Developer 2>&1
BUILD_EXIT=$?
set -e
if [ $BUILD_EXIT -ne 0 ]; then
    echo -e "${RED}Build failed (exit $BUILD_EXIT). If exit 137, increase server RAM to 4GB+.${NC}"
    exit 1
fi
echo -e "${GREEN}[5/7] Build complete.${NC}"

## 6. Copy runtime libraries
echo -e "\n${YELLOW}[6/7] Copying runtime libraries to server...${NC}"
LIBDIR=/mnt/server/sbox-public/game/bin/linuxsteamrt64
mkdir -p $LIBDIR
for LIB in \
    libXi libXcursor libXrandr libXinerama libXfixes libXext libXrender \
    libX11 libX11-xcb libxcb libxcb-dri3 libxcb-present libxcb-randr \
    libxcb-render libxcb-shm libxcb-sync libxcb-xfixes libxshmfence \
    libXau libXdmcp libXss libxkbcommon \
    libvulkan libVkLayer \
    libopenal \
    libfreetype \
    libdrm libdrm_amdgpu libgbm \
    libwayland-client libwayland-cursor libwayland-egl libwayland-server \
    libdecor-0 \
    libSDL2 \
    libfontconfig libharfbuzz libfribidi libpango libpangoft2 libpangocairo \
    libcairo libpixman libdatrie libthai \
    libpulse libasyncns libsndfile libFLAC libvorbis libvorbisenc libogg libopus \
    libsamplerate libsndio libmpg123 libmp3lame \
    libelf libedit libllvm; do
    find /usr/lib -name "${LIB}*.so*" -exec cp -n {} $LIBDIR/ \; 2>/dev/null
done
LIB_COUNT=$(ls -1 $LIBDIR/*.so* 2>/dev/null | wc -l)
echo -e "${GREEN}[6/7] $LIB_COUNT libraries in $LIBDIR${NC}"

## Restore data backup
if [ -d "/tmp/sbox-data-backup" ]; then
    echo -e "${YELLOW}Restoring data backup...${NC}"
    mkdir -p /mnt/server/sbox-public/game/data
    cp -r /tmp/sbox-data-backup/* /mnt/server/sbox-public/game/data/
    rm -rf /tmp/sbox-data-backup
    echo -e "${GREEN}Data restored.${NC}"
fi

## 7. Permissions
echo -e "\n${YELLOW}[7/7] Setting permissions...${NC}"
chmod +x /mnt/server/sbox-public/game/sbox-server 2>/dev/null || true
chown -R 999:999 /mnt/server
echo -e "${GREEN}[7/7] Permissions set.${NC}"

echo -e "\n${BLUE}=================================================${NC}"
echo -e "${GREEN}  Installation complete!${NC}"
echo -e "${BLUE}=================================================${NC}"
exit 0

variables.name: Server Name
variables.description: Name of the server visible in the server list.

variables.name: Game Identifier
variables.description: The s&box game to load (org.game format). Example: facepunch.sandbox

variables.name: Game Map
variables.description: The map/scene to load (org.map format). Example: facepunch.flatgrass. Leave empty if not needed.

variables.name: Extra Args
variables.description: Optional extra launch arguments appended to sbox-server. Use with caution.

variables.name: Game Server Token
variables.description: Optional Steam game server token passed as +net_game_server_token.

variables.name: Query Port
variables.description: UDP port used by Steam for server discovery.
